CN:

OMFG VERLAINE?!?!?!

Mmmmfgh I want him so bad I swear to god like I better NEVER see his ass in these streets or he's getting POUNDED 😂🙏🔥🔥🔥🔥🗣🗣🗣🗣 (realistically, I know he ain't ever stepping on the streets but maybe in this au...)

Everybody talks about Chuuya and Dazai mischaracterization but like why does everybody villainize Verlaine to the extent they do. Yeah, he did fucked up shit, but I think people also forget that he canonly wanted to take Chuuya from the government and raise him as a normal boy?? Verlaine truly did have brotherly love for Chuuya, but he went about showing that love WRONG

forever a Verlaine dickrider I swear nobody gets to diss my French princess

Rimlaine still makes me so sick wdym Rimbaud is his heartbeat wdym they have each other's names bleghhhhh

Verlaine save your brother in the main manga please everybody is so fucking cooked rn 🙏🙏🙏

yeah woah I've been yapping

Enjoy, babes!! 💕

Me when my card declines at therapy and then the receptionist pulls out the "if you know yourself so well which are picking" Tiktok slideshow and then it's a choice between "get your father's love and affection" or "make your mom happy/make her love herself again"

I pray that death feels like falling asleep in the car after a long trip as a kid

I pray that death feels like the first day of summer break

I pray that death feels like waking up early to take a sneak peak at the Christmas presents under the tree, under the full belief that Santa delivered them, getting so giddy with excitement that you can't go back to sleep

For one day, I pray to be young again, to feel those long gone feelings that I'll never even get remotely close to again.

He might've ruined a good portion of my youth, but at the end of the day, those memories and feelings, alongside knowing my mom did everything she could for me, will allow me to weep for my missing glory days.

To this day, I still think about little me. Is she proud? I hope she is. I've done everything I can to ensure she is. But at the same time, I wish I could say sorry.
creator: Dr_P3PZ
